text:
Published

on

By

Hip hop legend, Snoop Dogg, pop star Billie Eilish and iconic rock band the Red Hot Chili Peppers are expected to perform at the Paris Olympic Games Closing Ceremony on Sunday, Variety is reporting.

According to a report published by the outlet on August 8, the three artists will feature in the handoff of the Summer Olympic Games from Paris to Los Angeles, California, in a mix of pre-taped and live performances.

Variety reported that the closing ceremony will also feature a stunt by famous Hollywood actor Tom Cruise.

At the end of Sunday’s Closing Ceremony, Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass will accept the Olympic Torch and bring it home as she returns from Paris. The city will host the 2028 Summer Olympic Games.

Snoop Dogg, Billie Eilish and Red Hot Chili Peppers are natives of Los Angeles. Snoop carried the Olympic Torch ahead of the opening ceremony of the Paris Games.
